# technitium_dhcp_leases (Data Source)

Lists all DHCP leases (dynamic and reserved) in a Technitium DNS Server DHCP scope.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dhcp_leases" "lan" {
  scope_name = "LAN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scope_name` (String) The name of the DHCP scope to list leases from.

### Read-Only

- `leases` (Attributes List) List of DHCP leases in the scope. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--leases))

<a id="nestedatt--leases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `leases`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The leased IP address.
- `client_identifier` (String) The client identifier.
- `hardware_address` (String) The MAC address of the client.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the client.
- `lease_expires` (String) The timestamp when the lease expires.
- `lease_obtained` (String) The timestamp when the lease was obtained.
- `scope` (String) The scope name for this lease.
- `type` (String) The lease type (Dynamic or Reserved).
